message.x:
401 WUUS53 KLOT 211600 TORLOT ILC031-043-197-211630- /O.NEW.KLOT.TO.W.0001.260421T1600Z-260421T1630Z/
BULLETIN - EAS ACTIVATION REQUESTED Tornado Warning National Weather Service Chicago IL 1100 AM CDT Tue Apr 21 2026
The National Weather Service in Chicago has issued a
* Tornado Warning for... North central Kane County in northeastern Illinois... South central McHenry County in northeastern Illinois... Northwestern DuPage County in northeastern Illinois...
* Until 1130 AM CDT.
* At 1100 AM CDT, a severe thunderstorm capable of producing a tornado was located over Pingree Grove, moving east at 35 mph.
HAZARD...Tornado and quarter size hail. SOURCE...Radar indicated rotation. IMPACT...Flying debris will be dangerous to those caught without shelter.
LAT...LON 4215 8850 4203 8820 4194 8810 4198 8786 4213 8784 4222 8839 TIME...MOT...LOC 1600Z 265DEG 31KT 4208 8837 TORNADO...RADAR INDICATED MAX HAIL SIZE...1.00 IN
$$
